A versatile choice, Blackberry Super Boof is perfect for enjoying during the evening or when you need to unwind without losing mental clarity. Linalool : Brings soothing floral aromas that enhance the calming experience. Its balanced effects allow you to release physical tension and enjoy a mellow, calming experience, all while staying mentally engaged. Ideal for unwinding after a long day or enjoying a laid-back evening, this strain provides the perfect mix of calm and focus. The blend of fruity flavor and tranquil effects makes Blackberry Super Boof a sought-after strain for those needing both relaxation and a refreshing sensory experience. effects_provenance.raw: Black Cherry Gelato THCA Flower Supreme / 28g Strain Profile Black Cherry Gelato THCA Flower is a decadent hybrid that blends the creamy dessert-like profile of Gelato with the rich sweetness of dark cherries. The cultivar produces dense, deeply colored buds with a bold layered aromatic profile featuring ripe cherry, berry jam, and hints of vanilla frosting with a touch of earthy spice. Effects Black Cherry Gelato delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of dessert-rich character that distinguishes Gelato-family hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: ripe black cherry up front, with sweet berry through the middle and a creamy vanilla finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably bakery-leaning. The terpene profile reads cherry-berry-and-cream — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Black Cherry Gelato harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Black Cherry Gelato THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Black Cherry Gelato THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. effects_provenance.raw: Super Boof THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Super Boof THCA Flower is a balanced hybrid bred from Black Cherry Punch crossed with Tropicana Cookies . The cultivar earned Leafly's Strain of the Year in 2024 on the strength of its vibrant citrus flavor and versatile effects — producing dense, colorful buds with strong bag appeal and a layered aromatic profile. Effects Super Boof delivers a versatile, well-rounded high that suits a wide range of moments. The cerebral lift is mood-lifting and clear-headed; the body baseline stays comfortable and mobile — making this a flexible cultivar for daytime use, social settings, or evening flavor-led wind-down. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: vibrant citrus up front, with sweet ripe cherry through the middle and a layered cookie-cream finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably bright. The terpene profile reads citrus-cherry-and-cream — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Super Boof harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Super Boof THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Super Boof THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains.
